notableEvents.label: Luis Robert Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Robert Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Jared Young out at 2nd. Luis Robert Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson singles on a line drive to left fielder Carson Benge. Jacob Wilson to 2nd. Jacob Wilson advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Carson Benge.
